desc.cn: 用 Rust 构建的高性能分布式对象存储系统
desc.en: A high-performance, distributed object storage system built in Rust

darwin/rustfs.cmd: brew tap rustfs/homebrew-tap && brew install rustfs

/docker.cmd:
docker pull rustfs/rustfs:latest
docker run -d \
  --name rustfs \
  -p 9000:9000 \
  -p 9001:9001 \
  -v /data:/data \
  rustfs/rustfs:latest
